_comment: Channel-surfing lineup (ROADMAP §4). Each entry needs a 'name' and either a 'handle' (e.g. @NASA) or a full 'url' to any yt-dlp-supported channel/playlist. Order here is the channel order (CH 1, CH 2, ...) you flip through with 'ch up' / 'ch down'. Edit freely and restart the crt-player service. setup.sh installs this with 'cp -n' so it never clobbers your edits.
